# Primorum
> Primorum builds the compounding learning loop between human capital and token capital — the System 2 dependability layer on frontier AI. Private evals against your outcomes, not public benchmarks. Model-sovereign systems. Free audit finds $100K+ in automatable operations. Fixed-price builds with guaranteed delivery. Based in Toronto.

## Core
- [Primorum](https://primorum.ai/): We'll find $100K+ in automatable operations or tell you there's nothing worth doing. The audit is free, concrete, and delivered within a week: dollar figure, named tools, build estimates, phased roadmap. Beyond the automations, we build your token capital — systems that compound with every use, survive model swaps, and encode your institutional knowledge.
- [Free AI Operations Audit](mailto:engage@primorum.ai): Request via engage@primorum.ai

## Skills Directory
- [Agent Skills Directory](https://primorum.ai/skills): Curated directory of the best agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and compatible AI coding agents — official vendor skills (Anthropic, Vercel, Cloudflare, Hugging Face, Expo), battle-tested development workflow libraries, and the curated lists worth knowing. Every entry links to its GitHub source.
- [Skills JSON API](https://primorum.ai/skills/skills.json): Machine-readable index of the full directory — every skill with repo URL, tags, category, and copy-paste install instructions (install.steps). CORS-enabled, no auth. Fetch this instead of scraping the HTML.
- [Individual Skills Index](https://primorum.ai/skills/skills-index.json): Flat JSON index of 195 individual skills (SKILL.md level) across all tracked collections — name, description, source repo, raw SKILL.md URL, detail page. Use this to find a specific skill for a task.
- Guides: [what are agent skills](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/what-are-agent-skills), [skills vs plugins vs MCP](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/skills-vs-plugins-vs-mcp), [how to install](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/how-to-install-claude-code-skills), [how to write a skill](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/how-to-write-a-skill), [best skills](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/best-claude-code-skills), [other agents](https://primorum.ai/skills/guides/skills-for-other-agents).
- Agent instructions for loading skills: https://primorum.ai/skills#for-agents — general pattern: clone the repo, copy the skill folder into ~/.claude/skills/ (or your agent's SKILL.md directory); Claude Code marketplaces install via /plugin marketplace add <owner/repo>.
- WebMCP: the /skills pages register read-only tools (search_skills, get_skill, get_install_instructions) via document.modelContext / navigator.modelContext where supported, mirrored on window.__skillsDirectoryTools.

## Contact
- General: engage@primorum.ai
